title: Senior Doctor - Suven Pharmaceuticals - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Suven Pharmaceuticals - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Suven Pharmaceuticals in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Suven Pharmaceuticals:
Suven Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Suven Pharmaceuticals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
